questions.text: What happens automatically during the delivery creation step in the CMI/VMI process?
options: User status and delivery block are manually updated.
User status and delivery block are automatically removed.

questions.text: CMI/VMI orders are prioritized with order freezing after BOP run
CMI does not require Customer validation
The Co Managed Inventory (CMI) / Vendor Managed Inventory (VMI) is a shared ordering process with inputs from more then three L’Oreal entities
Full visibility and anticipation of expected inventory by L'Oréal's customer is provided
